nasb.text: Now therefore, you are cursed, and you shall never cease being slaves, both hewers of wood and drawers of water for the house of my God.”

esv.text: Now therefore you are cursed, and some of you shall never be anything but servants, cutters of wood and drawers of water for the house of my God.”

cnv.text: 現在你們要受到咒詛，你們中間必不斷有人作奴僕，為我　神的聖所作劈柴打水的人。”

ccb.text: 因此，你们是受咒诅的。你们要永远做奴仆，为我上帝的殿劈柴挑水。”
